name: Dungeon of Illusions: Fight To Escape

reviews.review_description: Yes this is more of a 15min experience there are several it does need some improvement but as far as being the bones and the structure for something bigger it is very well done the combat was similar to what you would find in battle Talent and the mechanic of the dungeon constantly changing I would love a full game version of this I sincerely hope that the developers are still working on this and hoping to grow on it because the idea for this game is amazing I was very satisfied but at the same point disappointed because it left me wanting more this is such a great concept that it's not just dungeon delving but you have to solve puzzles in order to progress further it had that whole Labyrinth Maze Feel. I will be featuring this experience on my channel which says a lot I normally do not do free content on my channel but I want these guys to get the support that they need so that way they can turn this into a full-fledged game this could easily be a $20 game if it was at full release even at Early Access I could still see this being $15 it is well worth it it's right up there with dungeons of Eternity.

developer_response.body:
We are glad to hear that you enjoyed the experience. We are planning on adding more content, and improving the performance so that the experience is available on Meta Quest 2 as well.
We wanted to give a small snippet to the player that could be expected from a full fledged gameplay experience.
If you have any feedback or suggestion please reach us out on our Discord or support@tretastudios.com

reviews.review_description: Beat the game in under 15 minutes

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear the experience was boring for you!
We would like to hear your feedback on which particular parts did you find dull/boring and which parts did you particularly like?
If you have any feedback or suggestion please reach us out on our Discord or support@tretastudios.com

We are planning on adding more content and levels to the game. Please let us know about the things you liked/did not like, and what kind of content would you like to see.
For any feedback/suggestion please connect with us on our Discord server or let us know on support@tretastudios.com
